name: Portfolio Website
description: A modern personal portfolio website to showcase skills, projects, and contact information with responsive design.
challenges: Handling responsive layout and optimizing image loading in Next.js.
futurePlans: Add blog section and improve animations with Framer Motion.

name: E-Commerce App
description: A full-stack e-commerce application with product listing, cart system, and secure payment integration.
challenges: Implementing authentication and integrating Stripe payment gateway.
futurePlans: Add admin dashboard and product recommendation system.

name: Blog Platform
description: A blog platform where users can create, edit, and publish posts with authentication system.
challenges: Managing real-time data and securing user authentication.
futurePlans: Add comment system and rich text editor.
